zh.Garthmyl, Aberriw, Mongomeryshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾加斯米爾
zh.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog是Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd的女兒，於大約1145年出生在威爾士福林爾。她於大約1195年與Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch在威爾士福林爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1210年在英國威爾斯福林爾享年67歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯福林爾。

zh-hans.Garthmyl, Aberriw, Mongomeryshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾加斯米爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog是Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd的女儿，于大约1145年出生在威尔士福林爾。她于大约1195年与Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch在威尔士福林爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1210年在英国威尔斯福林爾享年67岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯福林爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Jane , derived from Anglo-Norman form Jeanne. It is now quite widely used in the English-speaking world, often without the accent.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Caradog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Respelling of Caradog, an ancient Celtic name apparently derived from the root cār ‘love’. This name was borne by a British chieftain of the 1st century ad in the Latinized form Caractacus, son of Cunobelinos.

en.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog was born about 1145, in Flintshire, Wales as the daughter of Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd. She married Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch about 1195, in Flintshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1210, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Garthmyl, Aberriw, Mongomeryshire, Wales: Garthmyl, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog est née environ 1145, à Flintshire, Galles, fille de Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd. Elle a épousé Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch environ 1195, à Flintshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1210, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog wurde um 1145 in Flintshire, Wales, als Tochter von Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd geboren. Sie hat um 1195 in Flintshire, Wales Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1210 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog è nata il circa 1145 nel Flintshire, Galles come figlia di Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd. Lei sposato Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch circa 1195, nel Flintshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1210, nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradogは約1145年にウェールズフリントシュアイアでDafydd Fychan Ap Dafyddの娘として生まれた。約1195年にウェールズフリントシュアイアでIorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Gochと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1210年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで67歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog(은)는 대략 1145년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1195년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1210년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Flintshire, Gales filha de Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd. Ela casou-se com Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch aproximadamente 1195, em Flintshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog родилась около 1145 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс. Её отца звали Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch около 1195 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1210 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

Murió aproximadamente 1210, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
